text: treatment benefits include migrain pain subsiding in about 20 minutes. No lingering fuzziness from taking this medication. Did not make me sleepy. If migrain pain appeared hours later another dose taken. This drug is especially handy for anyone with pre-menstural migrain headaches for me there w4ere no treatment side effects. This medication did not cause drowsiness and I was able to keep doing my daily activiites. I also found that if I drank some coffee it would work even faster. It works in about 20 minutes after taking the medication. I take one tablet at the onset of of any migrain. After taking the tablet in about 20 minutes depending upon how fast I got to the pain. The medication started to work and within about 20 minutes the headache was all but forgotten. This is a safe great medication for anyone who suffers from migrain pain
